control_definition: Healthy donor lungs collected at transplantation
inclusion_rule_summary: Included in curated subset ipf_lung_extended because direct ipf versus healthy-donor lung comparison with a live accession-backed microarray loader.
exclusion_rule_summary: Restrict the contrast to the curated case and control arms defined in configs/subsets/ipf_lung_extended.yaml.
leakage_risks: Do not use downstream validation outcomes as discovery-time features.
